_note: WP-1 routing eval set (RAG_TASK_WP1, D-R30-9). The ≥40-case ground-truth set the brief's '40-q eval' always referred to but which was never built — only a 9-case SEED existed inline in scripts/autonomy/eval_tripwire.py (EVAL_CASES). This file is the standalone, NON-fenced superset: same case shape (id/question/assert), consumed by the same self-protected matcher scripts.autonomy.smoke.evaluate_probe, so kinds stay byte-for-byte compatible. Purpose: measure whether schema-constrained planning (PR-1 format=schema) and/or a larger planner (qwen3.6:27b) produce measurably BETTER PLANS — i.e. higher tool-routing accuracy — against ground-truth. Lives in scripts/eval/ (NOT scripts/autonomy/**) so app-side work can extend it without a fence fight; the deploy tripwire's curated 9-case subset stays Stan's to edit in the fenced file.
_baseline_expectation: The incumbent (wordcracker:v2 + format=json) is NOT expected to score 100%. Cases are deliberately seeded with KNOWN-OPEN routing gaps (the quoted-title book->affinity mislabel, S1) so the set has headroom to measure improvement. A baseline < 100% is the POINT — it is the gap PR-1/qwen3.6 must close. Do not 're-stamp to green'; record the incumbent pass-rate as the floor and compare candidates against it.
_supported_kinds: Matcher = scripts/autonomy/smoke.py::_match. Allowed assert kinds ONLY: answer_not_empty (auto/universal), contains, not_contains, regex_match, regex_no_match, intent_in, intent_not_in, tool_called, tool_not_called, tool_arg_contains, no_tool_arg_contains, latency_under_s. Payload fields: answer (str), intent (str), tool_calls [{name, args}]. A `history` list on a case drives the cross-turn path. Across-run kinds (same_intent_across_runs / repeat) are NOT supported here — they live only in predeploy_probe_suite.
_visa: Cases carrying "_visa": "pending" have CONTESTED ground-truth (reasonable people disagree on the correct tool/intent). Per D-R30-9 these labels are Stan's to confirm — the proposed label is in the assert + _proposed/_alternatives. Until visaed, treat their PASS/FAIL as advisory, not authoritative.

cases._category: Ambiguous similarity — book vs author (VISAED 2026-06-18 = author similarity)
cases.question: посоветуй что-нибудь в стиле Lovecraft
cases._note: Stan visaed: 'в стиле <author>' → author similarity, NOT a book recommendation. Ground-truth intent=author_closest, which _plan_author_closest dispatches as the author_influences tool (closest neighbours by Burrows Delta). The 'посоветуй что-нибудь' phrasing leans book-rec, so the incumbent may route to find_book_by_topic and fail here — that disagreement is exactly what this case measures.

assert.reason: visaed: style-of-an-author = author similarity

assert.name: author_influences
assert.reason: author_closest intent dispatches the author_influences tool (Burrows Delta neighbours)

assert.name: find_book_by_topic
assert.reason: visaed AGAINST the book-recommendation reading
